title: Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Senior Property Advisor (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
We at Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd are looking for an experienced Senior Property Advisor based out of Amritsar. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 6-10 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Portfolio Management
• Proficiency in RERA Compliance
• Proficiency in CRM Software
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Annual performance appraisal
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Salary Range: 12 LPA - 25 LPA per annum

Location: Amritsar, Punjab, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Tata Housing Consulting Pvt Ltd!
